title: 5-in-1 Silicone Remover & Finishing Tool Set – Caulking Tool Kit with Grout Scraper & Sealant Smoother – Silicone Sealant Removal & Application Tools for Bathroom Kitchen & Tiles
description: Silikone Remover and Caulking Tool Set for Clean and Precise JointsThis 5-in-1 silicone removal and smoothing kit helps you remove old sealant and create new, clean joints in the bathroom, kitchen or tiled areas. The sharp tools cut through old silicone while the smoothing pads ensure a flawless finish.Effortless Removal of Old SiliconeThe scraper blades loosen and remove hardened silicone and sealant along edges, tiles and corners without damaging the surface. Ideal for showers, sinks, bathtubs, windows and countertops.Smooth and Even New JointsThe different smoothing pads create clean lines in various angles and widths. Perfect for silicone, acrylic or sealing compounds. No additional release agents are needed, ensuring strong and long-lasting adhesion.23+ Shapes for Maximum PrecisionThe included tools offer more than 23 radii and angles, allowing you to match any joint in the bathroom or kitchen. Quick selection ensures fast workflow and accurate results.Organized StorageThe set comes in a durable storage box that protects the edges from dust and damage. Clean tools ensure clean joints – every time.This silicone remover and caulking kit is suitable for renovations, repairs and regular maintenance of silicone joints and sealants. Designed for DIY users and professionals.
features: ✅ VERSATILE & UNIVERSAL – This 5-in-1 silicone remover and finishing tool kit works with all kinds of sealants including silicone, acrylic and resin. Rounded edges are ideal for dry areas, while straight smoothers create clean joints in wet zones like showers or sinks.

✅ PERFECT SEALANT FINISH – Achieve flawless and elastic joints easily. The radius sizes are engraved on each silicone smoother so even DIY users can create professional-looking results with precise control.
✅ HANDY STORAGE BOX INCLUDED – Keep your tools clean and protected after every project. The included box protects the silicone tools from dust and damage and keeps each piece well organised.

✅ EASY TO USE – NO SEPARATING AGENT NEEDED – Simply apply your sealant, then remove excess silicone with the right smoother. Ideal for bathrooms, kitchens, tiles, windows and other sealing applications.

✅ COMPLETE 5-PIECE KIT – Offers over 23 different joint shapes for every application. Even for hard-to-reach corners or edges you’ll always have the right tool to remove or smooth silicone joints perfectly.
